name: prefix_cancel_left
reason: tests the cancellation direction directly — if this direction is broken the biconditional is unsound

name: different_len_suffix_different_concat
reason: sequences of different lengths appended to the same prefix should produce different results

name: empty_prefix_identity
reason: empty prefix concatenation should be identity — foundational axiom the lemma depends on

name: prefix_strictly_extends
code:
proof fn phi_4_prefix_strictly_extends(prefix: Seq<int>, s: Seq<int>)
    requires
        s.len() > 0,
    ensures
        prefix != prefix + s,
{
}
reason: a nonempty suffix should make the concatenation differ from the prefix alone

name: concat_preserves_first_element
reason: if suffixes differ at first element then concatenations must differ — tests that element-level inequality propagates
